overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked, foggy futuristic city. The vehicle travels along an elevated highway lined with concrete barriers and industrial buildings with red warning lights, eventually arriving at a secure NCPD police checkpoint with armed officers and a neon-lit police car.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete barriers and overhead gantries

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the elevated highway, passing under multiple overhead gantries and alongside industrial buildings

entered.detail: continuous concrete safety barrier running along the left side of the highway
rusted metal overhead bridge structure with red warning lights on top
tall industrial buildings with distinctive red aircraft warning lights on rooftops
tall street lighting fixtures illuminating the roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a foggy, elevated highway at night, flanked by concrete barriers on the left and industrial buildings with red warning lights in the distance. Overhead gantries and streetlights pass by as the camera maintains a steady forward motion through the empty multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint plaza with crosswalks and neon signage

events.description: vehicle slows down and executes a right turn into the checkpoint approach plaza
entering the covered driveway leading to the secure garage checkpoint

agents.ego_description: slowing down and turning right toward the security checkpoint entrance, navigating the crosswalk area

entered.detail: large illuminated entrance structure leading to the secure facility
white striped pedestrian crosswalk painted on the asphalt
large illuminated billboard with purple and white graphics
pedestrian walkway with distinctive cyan-green neon lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the highway and enters a wide plaza area with crosswalk markings, turning right toward a secure checkpoint entrance. Neon billboards and illuminated walkways become visible as the vehicle approaches the covered garage driveway, leaving the highway barriers behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure police checkpoint garage with NCPD vehicle and officers

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop in front of the police car and armed officers

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping at the police checkpoint where two armed officers flank a police car

notable_agents.action: NCPD police officer standing guard with weapon at the ready
NCPD police officer standing guard near the vehicle

entered.detail: futuristic police sedan with glowing blue POLICE and NCPD text on side panels
horizontal slatted metal security gate blocking the far end of the garage
dark concrete walls with overhead fluorescent lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the covered garage checkpoint and approaches an NCPD police car with glowing blue neon markings. Two armed police officers stand guard on either side of the vehicle as the camera comes to a stop in front of a metal security gate, completing the approach to the checkpoint.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a desolate, foggy highway into the sterile, neon-lit confines of a secure police checkpoint. It begins by gliding along an elevated multi-lane road at night, passing under overhead gantries and beside industrial buildings marked by distant red warning lights. As the vehicle exits the highway, the scene opens into a wide plaza with crosswalk markings and illuminated billboards before turning right toward a covered garage driveway. The environment then shifts from the open road to a restricted interior space, where the camera approaches a police car with glowing blue neon markings. Finally, the motion comes to a halt in front of a metal security gate, flanked by two armed police officers standing guard.
